extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and in chrome://extensions.

extDescription.message: Productivity add-ons for Beekeeper. Profile hover, quick actions and more — unofficial, not affiliated with Beekeeper AG.
extDescription.description: Short description for the Chrome Web Store listing.

featureProfileHoverDesc.message: Hover over a profile picture to see configurable profile fields as a tooltip.

optionsIntro.message: Choose which profile fields are shown in the hover tooltip.

fieldsHint.message: Fields appear here once the extension has loaded a first profile. If empty, hover over a profile picture in Beekeeper, then reload this page.

orderHint.message: Order in the tooltip equals the order of the selected fields. Drag & drop to sort.

tooltipEmpty.message: No fields with values found. Right-click the extension icon → Options.

onboardingStep1.message: Open Beekeeper in Chrome and log in.

onboardingStep2.message: Hover over any profile picture (avatar). The extension reads the profile through your existing Beekeeper session — no API token required.

onboardingStep3.message: Come back to this page after the first hover. The fields list below will be populated automatically.

onboardingStep4.message: Select the fields you want to see, drag to reorder, then click Save.

privacyNote.message: Privacy: profile data stays in your browser. The extension uses your existing Beekeeper login cookie and never sends data to any third party. No tracking, no analytics.

featureStickyPinDesc.message: Pin chats to keep them at the top of the chat list, regardless of activity.

stickyPinHint.message: Open Beekeeper, hover a chat → click the pin icon. Pinned chats stay at the top.

featureThemeEngineDesc.message: Apply custom CSS themes (high-contrast, OLED black, solarized, or your own).

customCssPlaceholder.message: /* Your custom CSS here. Targets the entire Beekeeper page. */

featureQuickPollsDesc.message: Add a poll button to the message composer. Reactions are counted as votes.

quickPollsHint.message: Click the poll icon next to the composer, type your question and options, then send.

featureExportDesc.message: Download your own messages, profile and team profiles as JSON or CSV. Local only — nothing uploaded.

featureReminderBotDesc.message: Right-click any message → snooze it. Get a desktop notification when the time is up.

reminderHint.message: Right-click on a message in Beekeeper → ‘Remind me…’ → choose duration.

featurePersonalStatsDesc.message: Track your own activity locally. See messages sent, hours active, kudos given. Private — never leaves your browser.

donationText.message: BeePlus is free and open-source. If it saves you time, consider supporting development:
